content: Scanned 7 competitors + 9 reference creators across LinkedIn, newsletter, blog, Twitter. Competitors (Snowball, Product Hackers, TheGrowtHacker) had no notable high-engagement content this week. Reference creators dominated: Elena Verna (employee advocacy), Lenny Rachitsky (agency>skills + freemium broken in AI), Amanda Natividad (business problem not content problem), Rob Walling (AI bad at product + 6 AI implementations), Hormozi (text plain > carousels), Ross Simmonds (80/20 distribution).
